title: Becoming a parent may make you love your partner less
description: Parents report loving their partners less within the first year of having a child, but that doesn't mean the feeling is permanent or inevitable
author: Carissa Wong

title: Mysterious ‘cold blob’ in the Atlantic suggests the AMOC is weakening
description: A patch of ocean south-east of Greenland is the only place on Earth that is cooling, and it could be a sign that the warm water "conveyor belt" in the Atlantic is slowing down
author: Alec Luhn

title: Stonehenge's altar stone probably wasn't transported by a glacier
description: A glacier could have carried the giant sandstone at the centre of Stonehenge southwards from north-east Scotland, but this scenario appears unlikely
author: James Woodford

title: The looming El Niño could be bad – but much worse is to come
description: Global warming will amplify the impacts of El Niño events, and could also make them much stronger and more far-reaching
author: Michael Le Page

title: Earth has a mysterious triple symmetry that may influence its climate
description: A circle running along the 27° east and 153° west meridians divides the globe into two halves with equal reflectivity – and this may have implications for solar geoengineering schemes
author: James Woodford

title: Ditch the niceties in AI prompts to save energy use, say researchers
description: A UN report warns of the rapid growth in AI energy consumption, but suggests users can improve efficiency by making prompts more concise
author: Luke Taylor
